description: Overrides ONLY — classification/lanes come from the platform policy (homelab .github/renovate-global.json, applied via RENOVATE_CONFIG_FILE; a repo needs no renovate.json to be classified). This file exists for one repo-specific constraint: the pypi `playwright` EXACT pin must match the mcr.microsoft.com/playwright/python image tag in tests/Dockerfile (browsers are baked into that image per version) — the two must never bump independently.

packageRules.description: playwright lockstep: the pypi pin + the playwright/python docker tag move as ONE grouped PR (all update types — grouping only; lane labels still come from the global rules).
